# accessflow_row_security_policy (Resource)

A row-level security predicate injected into queries against a datasource table.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "accessflow_row_security_policy" "tenant_isolation" {
  datasource_id    = accessflow_datasource.prod_postgres.id
  table_name       = "orders"
  column_name      = "tenant_id"
  operator         = "EQUALS"
  value_type       = "VARIABLE"
  value_expression = ":user.tenant_id"
  applies_to_roles = ["ANALYST", "READONLY"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `column_name` (String)
- `datasource_id` (String)
- `operator` (String) `EQUALS`, `NOT_EQUALS`, `LESS_THAN`, `LESS_THAN_OR_EQUAL`, `GREATER_THAN`, `GREATER_THAN_OR_EQUAL`, `IN`, `NOT_IN`.
- `table_name` (String)
- `value_expression` (String)
- `value_type` (String) `VARIABLE` (resolves `:user.<key>`) or `LITERAL`.

### Optional

- `applies_to_group_ids` (List of String)
- `applies_to_roles` (List of String)
- `applies_to_user_ids` (List of String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Nested policies import as datasource_id/policy_id.
terraform import accessflow_row_security_policy.tenant_isolation \
  11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555/aaaaaaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeeeeeeeee
```
